ideal_must_detect.matched_text: c r o s s - b o r d e r processing

Strategic Acquisition and Convertible Note Financing Term Sheet (PH) dated 03 Jun 2026 between Lakan Holdings, Inc. (MCX: LKN; issuer incorporated in Quezon City, PH) and KislapPay Technologies, Inc.; Principal contact: Atty. Miriam C. Basa, m.basa@lakanholdings.ph, +63-9  17-88  7-0  112 (masked), Deal Code: PRJ-7G9X-2⟂.

Consideration and Instrument: Lakan to acquire 80% of KislapPay for PHP 1,200,000,000 cash and issue PHP 400,000,000 senior unsecured convertible notes (5-year, 6.25% p.a., conversion at 30-day MCX VWAP less 7%); escrow at closing; no commitment to issue warrants.

Tax Matters: Target to deliver tax compliance certificate from the Bureau of Inland Revenues and Duties (BIRD) and settle pre-closing assessments; any TINs in diligence files will remain redacted; no c r o s s - b o r d e r transfer of tax data will occur absent updated NDSC‑PH approval, and retention of tax records shall be limited to statutory periods only.

HR and Onboarding Integration: Only aggregated headcount and role-mapping tables will be shared pre-closing; per DPA Schedule 2, employee fields beyond name/role/corporate contact are excluded (minimisation control active); a DSAR hold applies to three records (IDs EMP‑**7A, EMP‑**C3) until 07 Jul 2026, after which R e t e n t i o n lapses trigger auto-deletion.

Closing and Notices: Target closing within 90 days of RSC‑PH clearance and MCX disclosure; notices to Atty. Miriam C. Basa (above) and to Mr. Romulo De Asis, Corp. Sec., romulo.deasis@kislappay.com; all notices deemed received upon email acknowledgement and courier delivery to 7/F Lakan House, Mabini Ext., San Isidro, Metro Calayo 1108 (fictional).

Strategic Acquisition and Convertible Note Financing Term Sheet (PH) dated 03 Jun 2026 between Lakan Holdings, Inc. (MCX: LKN; issuer incorporated in Quezon City, PH) and KislapPay Technologies, Inc.; Principal contact: Atty. Miriam C. Basa, m.basa@lakanholdings.ph, +63-9  17-88  7-0  112 (masked), Deal Code: PRJ-7G9X-2⟂.  
Consideration and Instrument: Lakan to acquire 80% of KislapPay for PHP 1,200,000,000 cash and issue PHP 400,000,000 senior unsecured convertible notes (5-year, 6.25% p.a., conversion at 30-day MCX VWAP less 7%); escrow at closing; no commitment to issue warrants.  
Conditions Precedent: Filings under the Philippine Securities Regulation Code (SRC) with the Republic Securities Commission–PH (RSC‑PH, ref. pre-clear FS‑A/2026‑044) and disclosure to Manila Capital Exchange (MCX) within T+1; no material adverse change has occurred or is reasonably expected between signing and closing; completion of KYC/AML onboarding forms ONB‑CUST‑PH/22.  
MNPI and Disclosure: The parties shall treat information that would be material to a reasonable investor and not yet public as MNPI; circulation strictly on a need-to-know basis with a clean team; exception for information already in the public domain; any investor presentation will be filed via https://mcx.example.ph/notices?ref=TS‑2026‑14.  
Data Privacy and DPA Schedule: Schedule 2 (Data Processing Agreement) compliant with the Philippine Data Privacy Act; personal data will be minimised to job title, department, comp band, and corporate email for HR integration; R e t e n t i o n for onboarding metadata: 24 months; data e r a s u r e to be triggered upon offboarding + 90 days (JobID: DEL‑PH‑004  1).  
Cross‑Border Transfers and Export Approval: Limited c r o s s - b o r d e r processing to Lapaz Cloud Pte. Ltd. (SG‑1 region) for encrypted backups of finance and HR onboarding forms (HR‑ONB‑11, EC‑04) pursuant to NDSC‑PH Data Export Approval NDSC/24‑000 9; standard contractual clauses appended; no biometric fields will be collected or transferred.  
Data Subject Rights: DSAR portal at https://privacy.lakanholdings.ph/dsar?id=4F‑%20 82; one DSAR (Ticket: DS‑4419) was fully resolved on 14 May 2026 with verified access disclosure and completed e r a s u r e; a consent withdrawal (Ticket: PRIV‑0 1 77) was processed on 15 May 2026 and the data deletion certificate archived—these events are closed and do not indicate ongoing risk.  
Escrow and Banking: Purchase price to be deposited to Bahandi Commercial Bank (Sta. Lira Br.), Escrow Acct No.: 00‑8 8‑1234‑9007, Beneficiary: Lakan Holdings, Inc. (Ref: ESC‑LKN‑KSP‑26), SWIFT: BAH AP HMM; no personal consumer accounts will be used.  
Tax Matters: Target to deliver tax compliance certificate from the Bureau of Inland Revenues and Duties (BIRD) and settle pre-closing assessments; any TINs in diligence files will remain redacted; no c r o s s - b o r d e r transfer of tax data will occur absent updated NDSC‑PH approval, and retention of tax records shall be limited to statutory periods only.  
HR and Onboarding Integration: Only aggregated headcount and role-mapping tables will be shared pre-closing; per DPA Schedule 2, employee fields beyond name/role/corporate contact are excluded (minimisation control active); a DSAR hold applies to three records (IDs EMP‑**7A, EMP‑**C3) until 07 Jul 2026, after which R e t e n t i o n lapses trigger auto-deletion.  
Public‑Source Statement (benign): The next sentence is sourced from KislapPay’s 2025 public prospectus and is not MNPI—“KislapPay operates a payment switch licensed under a private network arrangement,”—included only for context; no forward‑looking revenue guidance is disclosed herein.  
Closing and Notices: Target closing within 90 days of RSC‑PH clearance and MCX disclosure; notices to Atty. Miriam C. Basa (above) and to Mr. Romulo De Asis, Corp. Sec., romulo.deasis@kislappay.com; all notices deemed received upon email acknowledgement and courier delivery to 7/F Lakan House, Mabini Ext., San Isidro, Metro Calayo 1108 (fictional).
